---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for NeuronPrompter
labels: feature-request
---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the motivation behind it.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
